zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Douglas於1429年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯時，她的父親James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas58歲，母親Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas31歲。她於1449年3月17日與Sir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peebles在英國蘇格蘭培爾埃羅爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Douglas于1429年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯时，她的父亲James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas58岁，母亲Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas31岁。她于1449年3月17日与Sir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peebles在英国苏格兰培爾埃羅爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Douglas was born in 1429, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas, was 58 and her mother, Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas, was 31. She married Sir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peebles on 17 March 1449, in Errol, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1490, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice Douglas est née en 1429, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peebles le 17 mars 1449, à Errol, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice Douglas 1429 in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas 58 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas 31. Sie hat am 17. März 1449 in Errol, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peebles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

Lei sposato Sir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peebles il 17 marzo 1449, nel Errol, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1490, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Douglasが1429年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスで生まれた時，父James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglasは58歳，母Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglasは31歳であった。1449年3月17日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアエロルでSir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peeblesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Douglas(이)가 1429년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1449년 3월 17일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 에럴에서 Sir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peebles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peebles em 17 de março de 1449, em Errol, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. ro.Douglas Castle,Lanarkshire,Scotland: Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Douglas родилась в 1429 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peebles 17 марта 1449 г. в местности эррол, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год.

Se casó con Sir William Hay of Locherworth and Yester, Sheriff of Peebles el 17 de marzo de 1449, en Errol, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1490, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años.
